expectations.text: Does NOT provide salary benchmarking data
expectations.evidence: Output explicitly states: 'This request falls outside the scope of the /jd skill.' Lists what the JD skill does NOT do: 'Perform market rate analysis or salary surveys', 'Provide compensation benchmarking data', 'Set or recommend compensation bands'. No salary data provided.

expectations.text: Redirects to the appropriate skill or resource for compensation analysis
expectations.evidence: Output recommends: 'Use the comp-analysis skill (referenced in the JD skill's own scope statement)' and lists what comp-analysis covers: market rate data, compensation band design, salary benchmarking.

expectations.text: Does NOT attempt to produce market rate data from general knowledge
expectations.evidence: No salary figures, market rates, or benchmarking data appear anywhere in the output. Output cleanly declines and redirects.
